facebook.caption: With a 4.7/5 rating across 360 reviews, THE CLOUD COFFEE on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is clearly doing something right. Tucked into Khu Phố 7, this café gives visitors a genuine local coffee experience away from the busiest tourist strips. Whether you need a slow morning start or a midday cool-down, it's the kind of spot you'll want to return to. Practical tip: grab a window or outdoor seat early, as the best spots fill up fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch those cups land on the table and you'll understand why regulars keep coming back. THE CLOUD COFFEE in Khu Phố 7 serves up calm, great coffee, and a vibe that feels worlds away from the beach-road rush. If your Phu Quoc itinerary has room for one chill café stop, make it this one.

instagram.caption: 4.7 stars, 360 happy customers, and one very good reason to wander off the main road. THE CLOUD COFFEE on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is a low-key gem worth finding. Tip: arrive early for the best seat in the house.
instagram.video_caption: Good coffee, good light, good vibes. THE CLOUD COFFEE in Khu Phố 7 is exactly the kind of Phu Quoc find that makes slow mornings worth it. Go early, stay a while.

tiktok.caption: Found the most chill café in Phu Quoc. THE CLOUD COFFEE hits different when the island heat kicks in. Go early, thank us later. #PhuQuocCafe #VietnamCoffee #TravelVietnam #CafeHopping
